raw_consumer_statement: XX/XX/year> American Express upgraded my card to a Hilton Honors Surpass Card without my consent. The cost of the Surpass Card is {$150.00} annually. I have been an AX cardholder for numerous years and have never paid an annual fee. AX never mailed me anything throughout my dispute with the company displaying any form that was signed by me that I agreed to this membership upgrade. I am attaching the necessary documentation revealing the dispute process which started formally XX/XX/year>. One wants to pay especially close attention to the fees of {$29.00} and {$40.00} which progress higher as the process unfolds. I am also contesting the late fees which continually are added as Im not paying a fraudulent bill. I contest I owe AX XXXX dollars. Also, the company does not act on a human level but by rude Ai interactions which are one-sided and go nowhere. My last payment to AX was {$100.00} for legitimate purchases. I just received another bill, and the current charges are up to {$260.00}. I also filed a complaint with XXXX, but AX ignored it. AX also ignores the Annual Electronics Fund Transfer Disclosure. The company has never sent me a document on a yearly basis and does not respond to suspected errors.
